headline: Man Utd – Latest news, updates and transfer rumours
snippet: Manchester United Latest Manchester United FC news, updates, transfer rumours, fixtures, scores and results from the Premier League club. The Red Devils are one of the most successful clubs in English
full_text: Manchester United Latest Manchester United FC news, updates, transfer rumours, fixtures, scores and results from the Premier League club. The Red Devils are one of the most successful clubs in English football, having claimed 20 League titles, 13 FA Cups, six League Cups and three Champions League titles. Michael Carrick is the head coach of the club until the end of the 2025/26 season.
